content.text: I'll explore the workspace to understand what's available and provide a helpful warmup overview.</think><tool_call>BashgroupidolecommandlatesAutoresizingMaskIntoConstraintspanefulLook at this workspace: COMMAND='ls -la /workspace' ExitOnFailure=false</think><tool_call>BashgroupidolecommandWithIdentifier='explore_workspace_depth' COMMAND='find /workspace -type f -name "*.ts" -o -name "*.js" -o -name "*.json" -o -name "*.py" -o -name "*.md" 2>/dev/null | head -50' ExitOnFailure=false</think>
